Document:
# Stat Formulas & Calculations
This page documents the math behind how character stats affect gameplay in OpenEdge 14.
## Stat Ranges
All four stats (STR, VIT, DEX, INT) use the same range: - [bold]Minimum:[/bold] 1 - [bold]Maximum:[/bold] 10 - [bold]Default (no spending):[/bold] 5
## How Stats Affect Gameplay
### Strength (STR) - Increases melee damage and carrying capacity - Each point above 5 adds bonus melee damage - Affects stamina usage in combat
### Vitality (VIT) - Increases maximum health (MobThresholds) - Each point adds health to the max pool - Affects stamina regeneration
### Dexterity (DEX) - Affects attack speed and dodge chance - DEX multiplier applied to action delays - Higher DEX = faster actions
### Intelligence (INT) - Increases maximum mana (MagicEnergy) - Required for high-level spell casting - Affects spell power
## Effective Stat Formula
EffectiveStat = min(BaseStat + sum(Modifiers), MaxStat)
Where [mono]Modifiers[/mono] is a dictionary of source -> bonus value pairs.
## Content Under Construction
Detailed formula documentation coming soon. For now, refer to the source: [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/CharacterStats/OE14CharacterStatsSystem.cs[/mono]
